sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34557" key="e)mpu/retos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπύρ-ετος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34557.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in fever heat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
